tEn: InternVL3: Exploring Advanced Training and Test-Time Recipes for Open-Source Multimodal Models
tZh: InternVL3：探索开源多模态模型的高级训练与测试时策略
sEn: InternVL3 introduces a native multimodal pre-training paradigm, achieving state-of-the-art performance among open-source MLLMs with 72.2 on MMMU.
sZh: InternVL3 采用原生多模态预训练范式，在 MMMU 上取得 72.2 分，创下开源多模态大模型新纪录。
absEn: We introduce InternVL3, a significant advancement in the InternVL series featuring a native multimodal pre-training paradigm. Rather than adapting a text-only large language model (LLM) into a multimodal large language model (MLLM) that supports visual inputs, InternVL3 jointly acquires multimodal and linguistic capabilities from both diverse multimodal data and pure-text corpora during a single pre-training stage. This unified training paradigm effectively addresses the complexities and alignment challenges commonly encountered in conventional post-hoc training pipelines for MLLMs. To further improve performance and scalability, InternVL3 incorporates variable visual position encoding (V2PE) to support extended multimodal contexts, employs advanced post-training techniques such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and mixed preference optimization (MPO), and adopts test-time scaling strategies alongside an optimized training infrastructure. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that InternVL3 delivers superior performance across a wide range of multi-modal tasks. In particular, InternVL3-78B achieves a score of 72.2 on the MMMU benchmark, setting a new state-of-the-art among open-source MLLMs. Its capabilities remain highly competitive with leading proprietary models, including ChatGPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini 2.5 Pro, while also maintaining strong pure-language proficiency. In pursuit of open-science principles, we will publicly release both the training data and model weights to foster further research and development in next-generation MLLMs.
absZh: 我们推出了 InternVL3，这是 InternVL 系列的一次重大进步，其特点是采用了原生多模态预训练范式。与将纯文本大语言模型（LLM）适配为支持视觉输入的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）不同，InternVL3 在单个预训练阶段同时从多样化的多模态数据和纯文本语料中获取多模态和语言能力。这种统一的训练范式有效解决了传统 MLLM 事后训练流程中常见的复杂性和对齐挑战。为了进一步提升性能和可扩展性，InternVL3 引入了可变视觉位置编码（V2PE）以支持扩展的多模态上下文，采用了监督微调（SFT）和混合偏好优化（MPO）等先进的后训练技术，并采用了测试时扩展策略以及优化的训练基础设施。大量实证评估表明，InternVL3 在广泛的多模态任务中表现出卓越性能。特别是，InternVL3-78B 在 MMMU 基准测试中取得了 72.2 分，创下了开源 MLLM 的新纪录。其能力与领先的专有模型（包括 ChatGPT-4o、Claude 3.5 Sonnet 和 Gemini 2.5 Pro）保持高度竞争力，同时保持了强大的纯语言能力。秉承开放科学原则，我们将公开发布训练数据和模型权重，以促进下一代 MLLM 的进一步研究和发展。

contrib.en: Proposes native multimodal pre-training that jointly learns linguistic and multimodal capabilities in a single stage, avoiding post-hoc alignment challenges.
contrib.zh: 提出原生多模态预训练，在单一阶段联合学习语言和多模态能力，避免事后对齐挑战。

contrib.en: Integrates Variable Visual Position Encoding (V2PE) to support extended multimodal contexts with flexible position increments.
contrib.zh: 集成可变视觉位置编码（V2PE），通过灵活的位置增量支持扩展的多模态上下文。

contrib.en: Employs advanced post-training with supervised fine-tuning and mixed preference optimization (MPO) to enhance reasoning and alignment.
contrib.zh: 采用监督微调和混合偏好优化（MPO）的高级后训练，增强推理和对齐。

contrib.en: Adopts test-time scaling strategies with a visual process reward model (VisualPRM) for best-of-N selection, improving reasoning performance.
contrib.zh: 采用测试时缩放策略，结合视觉过程奖励模型（VisualPRM）进行最佳N选，提升推理性能。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on MMMU (72.2) among open-source MLLMs, competitive with proprietary models like GPT-4o and Gemini 2.5 Pro.
contrib.zh: 在MMMU上达到开源多模态大语言模型中最优性能（72.2），与GPT-4o和Gemini 2.5 Pro等专有模型竞争。

contrib.en: Releases training data and model weights publicly to foster open-source research in next-generation MLLMs.
contrib.zh: 公开释放训练数据和模型权重，促进下一代多模态大语言模型的开源研究。

limits.en: Performance on some benchmarks (e.g., MuirBench, HallusionBench) still lags behind leading models like Qwen2.5-VL and Gemini 2.5 Pro.
limits.zh: 在某些基准（如MuirBench、HallusionBench）上仍落后于Qwen2.5-VL和Gemini 2.5 Pro等领先模型。

limits.en: Visual grounding performance plateaus at larger scales due to lack of additional grounding-specific data in training.
limits.zh: 由于训练中缺乏额外的定位特定数据，视觉定位性能在大规模时趋于平稳。

limits.en: Test-time scaling relies on a separate reward model (VisualPRM), adding computational overhead and complexity.
limits.zh: 测试时缩放依赖独立的奖励模型（VisualPRM），增加了计算开销和复杂性。

limits.en: Native multimodal pre-training requires careful balancing of multimodal and language data ratios; optimal ratio may not generalize.
limits.zh: 原生多模态预训练需要仔细平衡多模态和语言数据比例；最优比例可能不具泛化性。

limits.en: Evaluation primarily on static benchmarks; real-world dynamic and interactive scenarios (e.g., GUI agents) are less explored.
limits.zh: 评估主要在静态基准上进行；现实世界动态和交互场景（如GUI智能体）探索较少。

items.en: We introduce InternVL3, a significant advancement in the InternVL series featuring a native multimodal pre-training paradigm. Rather than adapting a text-only large language model (LLM) into a multimodal large language model (MLLM) that supports visual inputs, InternVL3 jointly acquires multimodal and linguistic capabilities from both diverse multimodal data and pure-text corpora during a single pre-training stage. This unified training paradigm effectively addresses the complexities and alignment challenges commonly encountered in conventional post-hoc training pipelines for MLLMs. To further improve performance and scalability, InternVL3 incorporates variable visual position encoding (V2PE) to support extended multimodal contexts, employs advanced post-training techniques such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and mixed preference optimization (MPO), and adopts test-time scaling strategies alongside an optimized training infrastructure. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that InternVL3 delivers superior performance across a wide range of multi-modal tasks. In particular, InternVL3-78B achieves a score of 72.2 on the MMMU benchmark, setting a new state-of-the-art among open-source MLLMs. Its capabilities remain highly competitive with leading proprietary models, including ChatGPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini 2.5 Pro, while also maintaining strong pure-language proficiency. In pursuit of open-science principles, we will publicly release both the training data and model weights to foster further research and development in next-generation MLLMs.
items.zh: 我们推出 InternVL3，这是 InternVL 系列的重大进展，其特点是原生多模态预训练范式。InternVL3 并非将纯文本大语言模型（LLM）改造为支持视觉输入的多模态大语言模型（MLLM），而是在单个预训练阶段同时从多样化的多模态数据和纯文本语料中获取多模态和语言能力。这种统一的训练范式有效解决了传统 MLLM 事后训练流程中常见的复杂性和对齐挑战。为了进一步提升性能和可扩展性，InternVL3 采用了可变视觉位置编码（V2PE）以支持扩展的多模态上下文，应用了监督微调（SFT）和混合偏好优化（MPO）等先进的后训练技术，并采用了测试时 Scaling 策略以及优化的训练基础设施。广泛的实证评估表明，InternVL3 在多种多模态任务上表现出卓越性能。特别是，InternVL3-78B 在 MMMU 基准上取得了 72.2 分，创下了开源 MLLM 的新纪录。其能力与领先的专有模型（包括 ChatGPT-4o、Claude 3.5 Sonnet 和 Gemini 2.5 Pro）保持高度竞争力，同时保持了强大的纯语言能力。秉承开放科学原则，我们将公开发布训练数据和模型权重，以促进下一代 MLLM 的进一步研究和发展。

items.en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) [32, 66, 121, 21, 19, 123, 68, 114, 97, 136, 71, 31, 85, 117, 18, 89, 105, 69] have recently achieved or even surpassed human-level performance in a broad spectrum of tasks, underscoring their potential as a significant stride toward artificial general intelligence (AGI). Yet, the majority of leading MLLMs—both open-source and proprietary—are adapted from text-only large language models through sophisticated multi-stage pipelines [21, 19, 18, 5, 121, 7]. These “post-hoc” approaches are built upon the original text-based pre-training processes, thereby introducing alignment challenges when integrating additional modalities such as vision. In practice, bridging modality gaps often necessitates incorporating auxiliary data from specialized domains (e.g., optical character recognition scenarios) and intricate parameter-freezing or multi-stage fine-tuning schedules to ensure that core linguistic capacities remain uncompromised [73, 7, 5, 18]. Such resource-intensive strategies highlight the need for more efficient multimodal training paradigms.
items.zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）[32, 66, 121, 21, 19, 123, 68, 114, 97, 136, 71, 31, 85, 117, 18, 89, 105, 69] 近期在广泛任务中已达到甚至超越人类水平，凸显其作为迈向通用人工智能（AGI）重要一步的潜力。然而，大多数领先的 MLLM（包括开源和专有模型）都是通过复杂的多阶段流程从纯文本大语言模型改造而来 [21, 19, 18, 5, 121, 7]。这些“事后”方法建立在原始基于文本的预训练过程之上，因此在集成视觉等额外模态时引入了对齐挑战。实践中，弥合模态差距通常需要引入来自专门领域（例如光学字符识别场景）的辅助数据，以及复杂的参数冻结或多阶段微调策略，以确保核心语言能力不受损害 [73, 7, 5, 18]。这种资源密集型策略凸显了对更高效多模态训练范式的需求。

items.en: In this report, we introduce InternVL3, the latest milestone in the InternVL series [21, 20, 18], which is distinguished by its native multimodal pre-training strategy. Rather than first pre-training a text-only large language model and subsequently retrofitting it via multimodal alignment to support visual processing, InternVL3 learns multimodal capabilities from the pre-training stage by jointly exposed to both text-only corpora and diverse multimodal datasets. This unified approach enables the model to simultaneously acquire linguistic and multimodal competencies in a more efficient and integrated manner.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍 InternVL3，这是 InternVL 系列 [21, 20, 18] 的最新里程碑，其特点是原生多模态预训练策略。InternVL3 并非先预训练纯文本大语言模型，然后通过多模态对齐进行改造以支持视觉处理，而是在预训练阶段通过同时接触纯文本语料和多样化多模态数据集来学习多模态能力。这种统一的方法使模型能够以更高效、更集成的方式同时获取语言和多模态能力。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Multimodal performance of the InternVL series and other advanced MLLMs. The InternVL series has consistently exhibited progressive enhancements in multimodal capabilities. The newly released InternVL3 significantly outperforms existing open-source MLLMs. Moreover, even in comparison with state-of-the-art closed-source commercial models, InternVL3 continues to demonstrate highly competitive performance.
items.capZh: 图 1：InternVL 系列及其他先进 MLLM 的多模态性能。InternVL 系列在多模态能力上持续展现出渐进式增强。新发布的 InternVL3 显著优于现有开源 MLLM。此外，即使与最先进的闭源商业模型相比，InternVL3 仍表现出极具竞争力的性能。

items.en: InternVL3 further excels through multiple innovations that reinforce both performance and scalability. We employ a variable visual position encoding (V2PE) mechanism [42] to accommodate longer multimodal contexts. Furthermore, advanced post-training strategies—comprising supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and mixed preference optimization (MPO) [124]—together with test-time scaling strategies [125] and an optimized training infrastructure [15], significantly enhance InternVL3’s efficiency and performance.
items.zh: InternVL3 通过多项创新进一步提升了性能和可扩展性。我们采用了可变视觉位置编码（V2PE）机制 [42] 以适应更长的多模态上下文。此外，先进的后训练策略——包括监督微调（SFT）和混合偏好优化（MPO）[124]——结合测试时 Scaling 策略 [125] 和优化的训练基础设施 [15]，显著提升了 InternVL3 的效率和性能。

items.en: Comprehensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that InternVL3 surpasses its predecessors (e.g., InternVL2.5 [18]) across a wide range of tasks, including multi-discipline reasoning, document understanding, multi-image / video understanding, real-world comprehension, multimodal hallucination detection, visual grounding, and multilingual capabilities. Notably, by incorporating expanded domain-specific datasets, InternVL3 also exhibits marked improvements in tool usage, GUI agents, industrial image analysis, and spatial reasoning, thus substantially extending the multimodal scenarios addressed by the InternVL series. It proves highly competitive with other open-source MLLMs such as Qwen2.5-VL [7] and remains on par with closed-source models (e.g., ChatGPT-4o [98], Claude-3.5 Sonnet [3], Gemini-2.5 Pro [117]). This versatility is evidenced by its 72.2-point performance on the MMMU benchmark [141], setting a new standard among open-source MLLMs. Additionally, InternVL3 demonstrates language capabilities comparable to other advanced LLMs of similar scale.
items.zh: 全面的实证评估表明，InternVL3 在广泛任务上超越了其前代（例如 InternVL2.5 [18]），包括多学科推理、文档理解、多图像/视频理解、真实世界理解、多模态幻觉检测、视觉定位和多语言能力。值得注意的是，通过整合扩展的领域特定数据集，InternVL3 在工具使用、GUI 智能体、工业图像分析和空间推理方面也表现出显著改进，从而大幅扩展了 InternVL 系列所涵盖的多模态场景。它与其他开源 MLLM（如 Qwen2.5-VL [7]）相比极具竞争力，并与闭源模型（例如 ChatGPT-4o [98]、Claude-3.5 Sonnet [3]、Gemini-2.5 Pro [117]）保持同等水平。这种多功能性体现在其在 MMMU 基准 [141] 上取得 72.2 分，创下了开源 MLLM 的新标准。此外，InternVL3 展示了与同等规模的其他先进 LLM 相当的语言能力。

items.en: To foster further advancements within the open-source community, we will release the training data111The open-source data are being organized, and a comprehensive list will be included in a future revision of this report. and model weights alongside this work, thereby ensuring transparency and reproducibility for the continued development of next-generation MLLMs.
items.zh: 为了促进开源社区的进一步发展，我们将随此工作发布训练数据¹¹¹开源数据正在整理中，完整列表将包含在本报告的后续修订版中。和模型权重，从而确保下一代 MLLM 持续发展的透明度和可复现性。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Performance of various MLLMs on the OpenCompass multimodal academic leaderboard. The enhanced InternVL series—InternVL3—demonstrates outstanding multimodal capabilities, significantly outperforming both the Qwen2.5-VL series and closed-source models such as Step-1o, GLM-4v-Plus, and GPT-4o. Remarkably, InternVL3-78B also remains highly competitive with the state-of-the-art Gemini-2.5-Pro.
items.capZh: 图 2：各种 MLLM 在 OpenCompass 多模态学术排行榜上的性能。增强后的 InternVL 系列——InternVL3——展示了卓越的多模态能力，显著优于 Qwen2.5-VL 系列以及 Step-1o、GLM-4v-Plus 和 GPT-4o 等闭源模型。值得注意的是，InternVL3-78B 还与最先进的 Gemini-2.5-Pro 保持高度竞争力。

items.en: Building upon the prior InternVL series [21, 19, 18], we propose InternVL3, a new generation within the InternVL model family. InternVL3 is specifically designed to streamline the training pipeline while significantly enhancing multimodal capabilities. In this section, we first delineate the core components of InternVL3, including its model architecture, training procedures, test-time scaling strategies, and infrastructure-level optimizations.
items.zh: 基于之前的 InternVL 系列 [21, 19, 18]，我们提出 InternVL3，这是 InternVL 模型家族的新一代。InternVL3 专门设计用于简化训练流程，同时显著增强多模态能力。在本节中，我们首先描述 InternVL3 的核心组件，包括其模型架构、训练流程、测试时 Scaling 策略和基础设施级优化。

items.en: The architecture of InternVL3 follows the same general framework as its predecessors, adhering to the “ViT-MLP-LLM” paradigm [66, 18, 41, 20]. Detailed architectural specifications are summarized in Table 1.
items.zh: InternVL3 的架构遵循与其前代相同的通用框架，采用“ViT-MLP-LLM”范式 [66, 18, 41, 20]。详细的架构规格总结在表 1 中。

items.en: Although the native pre-training paradigm discussed later could enable training MLLMs from scratch, we choose to initialize the ViT and LLM components with pre-trained model weights to reduce computational costs. The vision encoder is available in two configurations: InternViT-300M and InternViT-6B. For the language model, we leverage pre-trained large language models (LLMs), specifically the Qwen2.5 series and InternLM3-8B. Importantly, our LLM components are initialized solely from pre-trained base models, without employing instruction-tuned variants. The multilayer perceptron (MLP) utilized in the model is a two-layer network with random initialization. In line with the approach taken in InternVL2.5, InternVL3 incorporates a pixel unshuffle operation to enhance scalability for processing high-resolution images. This operation reduces the visual token count to one-quarter of its original value, representing each 448×448 image tile with 256 visual tokens.
items.zh: 尽管后面讨论的原生预训练范式可以从头开始训练 MLLM，但我们选择使用预训练模型权重初始化 ViT 和 LLM 组件，以降低计算成本。视觉编码器有两种配置：InternViT-300M 和 InternViT-6B。对于语言模型，我们利用预训练的大语言模型（LLM），特别是 Qwen2.5 系列和 InternLM3-8B。重要的是，我们的 LLM 组件仅从预训练基础模型初始化，而不使用指令微调变体。模型中使用的多层感知器（MLP）是一个随机初始化的两层网络。与 InternVL2.5 采用的方法一致，InternVL3 引入了像素重排操作，以增强处理高分辨率图像的可扩展性。该操作将视觉 token 数量减少到原始值的四分之一，每个 448×448 图像块用 256 个视觉 token 表示。

items.en: Variable Visual Position Encoding. InternVL3 also integrates the Variable Visual Position Encoding (V2PE) [42], which utilizes smaller, more flexible position increments for visual tokens. This modification facilitates the handling of longer multimodal contexts without excessively extending the position window. Specifically, each training sample for the MLLM is represented as:

items.en: In contrast to traditional MLLMs, where position indices increment uniformly by 1 for each token, irrespective of modality, V2PE employs a modality-specific recursive function for position index computation. This results in distinct position index assignments for textual and visual tokens:
items.zh: 与传统的 MLLM（其中位置索引对于每个 token 均匀递增 1，无论模态如何）不同，V2PE 采用模态特定的递归函数来计算位置索引。这导致文本和视觉 token 的位置索引分配不同：

items.tex:
p_{i}=p_{i-1}+\begin{cases}1,&\text{if }x_{i}\text{ is a textual token},\\
\delta,&\text{if }x_{i}\text{ is a visual token},\end{cases}

items.en: where δ\delta is a smaller increment (δ<1\delta<1), reducing the rate at which position indices increase for visual tokens. The standard increment of 1 is retained for textual tokens to preserve their positional distinctions. In line with the original V2PE design, we maintain that δ\delta remains constant within a single image to preserve the relative positional relationships. During training, δ\delta is randomly chosen for each image from a predefined set of fractional values:
items.zh: 其中 δ 是一个较小的增量（δ < 1），降低了视觉 token 位置索引的增加速率。文本 token 保留标准增量 1，以保持其位置区分。与原始 V2PE 设计一致，我们保持 δ 在单个图像内恒定，以保留相对位置关系。在训练期间，δ 从预定义的小数值集合中为每个图像随机选择：

items.en: During inference, δ\delta can be flexibly selected based on the input sequence length, enabling a balance between task performance and ensuring that position indices remain within the model’s valid context range. Notably, when δ=1\delta=1, V2PE reverts to the conventional positional encoding used in InternVL2.5.
items.zh: 在推理期间，可以根据输入序列长度灵活选择 δ，从而在任务性能与确保位置索引保持在模型有效上下文范围内之间取得平衡。值得注意的是，当 δ=1 时，V2PE 恢复为 InternVL2.5 中使用的传统位置编码。

items.en: We propose a native multimodal pre-training approach that consolidates language pre-training and multi-modal alignment training into a single pre-training stage. Unlike conventional paradigms—where a language-only large model is first trained (typically with language pre-training followed by language post-training) and subsequently adapted to accommodate additional modalities—our method performs integrated optimization by interleaving multimodal data (e.g., image–text, video–text, or interleaved image–text sequences) with large-scale textual corpora during the pre-training process. This unified training scheme enables the pre-trained model to learn both linguistic and multimodal capabilities simultaneously, ultimately enhancing its capability to handle vision-language tasks without introducing additional bridging modules or subsequent inter-model alignment procedures.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种原生多模态预训练方法，将语言预训练和多模态对齐训练合并为单个预训练阶段。与传统范式（首先训练纯语言大模型（通常经过语言预训练和语言后训练），然后改造以支持额外模态）不同，我们的方法通过在预训练过程中将多模态数据（例如图像-文本、视频-文本或交错图像-文本序列）与大规模文本语料交错，执行集成优化。这种统一的训练方案使预训练模型能够同时学习语言和多模态能力，最终增强其处理视觉-语言任务的能力，而无需引入额外的桥接模块或后续的模型间对齐过程。

Specifically, for an arbitrary training sample 𝐱=(x1,x2,…,xL)\mathbf{x}\;=\;\bigl{(}x_{1},x_{2},\dots,x_{L}\bigr{)} with the token length of LL, we adopt the standard left-to-right autoregressive objective:

items.en: Joint Parameter Optimization. Unlike the conventional “language-only training followed by multimodal adaptation” paradigm, our method updates all model parameters jointly during multimodal pre-training. Specifically, let
items.zh: 联合参数优化。与传统的“仅语言训练后多模态适配”范式不同，我们的方法在多模态预训练期间联合更新所有模型参数。具体地，令

items.en: where 𝒟multi\mathcal{D}_{\text{multi}} is the union of large-scale text-only and multimodal corpora (e.g., image–text or video–text pairs). We thus optimize a single model to handle these combined data sources. This multi-task joint optimization ensures that text representations and visual features are learned in concert, reinforcing alignment across modalities.
items.zh: 其中 Dmulti\mathcal{D}_{\text{multi}} 是大规模纯文本和多模态语料库（例如，图像-文本或视频-文本对）的并集。因此，我们优化单个模型来处理这些组合数据源。这种多任务联合优化确保文本表示和视觉特征协同学习，增强跨模态的对齐。

items.en: Moreover, this integrated optimization departs from conventional “language-only training followed by multimodal adaptation” pipelines, which often freeze or partially fine-tune certain layers in the LLM component or even in the ViT encoder when adapting to MLLM. In contrast, our method trains every layer jointly, allowing all parameters to be jointly optimized on large-scale multimodal corpora and ensuring that both linguistic and visual features evolve synchronously. As a result, the final parameters are primed for high performance on both pure language and multimodal tasks, without additional tuning steps.
items.zh: 此外，这种集成优化不同于传统的“仅语言训练后多模态适配”流程，后者在适配 MLLM 时通常会冻结或部分微调 LLM 组件甚至 ViT 编码器中的某些层。相比之下，我们的方法联合训练每一层，允许所有参数在大规模多模态语料库上联合优化，确保语言和视觉特征同步演化。因此，最终参数在纯语言和多模态任务上均具备高性能，无需额外的调优步骤。

items.en: Data. The pre-training data utilized in InternVL3 is broadly classified into two categories: multimodal data and pure language data. The multimodal dataset comprises a synthesis of pre-existing datasets alongside newly acquired real-world data. Specifically, we leverage the pre-training corpus from InternVL2.5, which covers a diverse range of domains such as image captioning, general question answering, mathematics, charts, optical character recognition (OCR), knowledge grounding, document understanding, multi-turn dialogue, and medical data. Although the overall data scale was not increased, the utility of this dataset was significantly improved by updating not only to the MLP module weights but also to those associated with the ViT and LLM components. In addition, to enhance the model’s ability to generalize in real-world applications, additional data is incorporated from tasks related to graphical user interfaces (GUI), tool usage, 3D scene understanding, and video comprehension.
items.zh: 数据。InternVL3 中使用的预训练数据大致分为两类：多模态数据和纯语言数据。多模态数据集包含现有数据集的合成以及新获取的真实世界数据。具体地，我们利用 InternVL2.5 的预训练语料库，涵盖图像描述、通用问答、数学、图表、光学字符识别（OCR）、知识定位、文档理解、多轮对话和医学数据等多个领域。尽管总体数据规模没有增加，但通过不仅更新 MLP 模块权重，还更新 ViT 和 LLM 组件相关的权重，该数据集的效用得到了显著提升。此外，为了增强模型在真实世界应用中的泛化能力，还从与图形用户界面（GUI）、工具使用、3D 场景理解和视频理解相关的任务中引入了额外数据。

items.en: To compensate for the relatively short and less diverse textual content typically found in multimodal datasets, we integrate pure language data into the pre-training process. This helps preserve and amplify the model’s capabilities in language understanding and generation. The language corpus is primarily constructed on the pre-training data from InternLM2.5 and is further augmented with various open-source text datasets [8, 77, 79]. This enhancement aims to improve the model’s performance on knowledge-intensive tasks, as well as its proficiency in mathematical and reasoning tasks.
items.zh: 为了弥补多模态数据集中通常存在的文本内容较短且多样性不足的问题，我们将纯语言数据整合到预训练过程中。这有助于保持和增强模型在语言理解和生成方面的能力。语言语料库主要基于 InternLM2.5 的预训练数据构建，并进一步通过多种开源文本数据集 [8, 77, 79] 进行扩充。这一增强旨在提高模型在知识密集型任务以及数学和推理任务上的表现。

items.en: Given the complexity of balancing these heterogeneous data sources, determining an appropriate sampling strategy is non-trivial. In InternVL3, we adopt a two-stage strategy to establish the optimal sampling ratio between multimodal and language data. Initially, we train separate models on the multimodal and language datasets and evaluate their performance on corresponding benchmarks, allowing us to identify optimal sampling ratios within each modality. Then, under a fixed total training budget, we combine the two modalities and determine their relative sampling ratio. Empirical studies show that a 1:3 ratio of language to multimodal data yields the best overall performance across both unimodal and multimodal benchmarks. Under this configuration, the total number of training tokens is approximately 200 billion, comprising 50 billion from language data and 150 billion from multimodal data.
items.zh: 鉴于平衡这些异构数据源的复杂性，确定合适的采样策略并非易事。在 InternVL3 中，我们采用两阶段策略来建立多模态数据和语言数据之间的最优采样比例。首先，我们在多模态和语言数据集上分别训练模型，并在相应基准上评估其性能，从而确定每种模态内的最优采样比例。然后，在固定的总训练预算下，我们结合两种模态并确定它们的相对采样比例。实证研究表明，语言与多模态数据 1:3 的比例在单模态和多模态基准上均能取得最佳整体性能。在此配置下，总训练 token 数约为 2000 亿，其中 500 亿来自语言数据，1500 亿来自多模态数据。

items.en: After the Native Multimodal Pre-Training, we apply a two-stage post-training strategy to further enhance the multimodal conversation and reasoning abilities of our models. This strategy consists of Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Mixed Preference Optimization (MPO). In the SFT phase, the model is trained to imitate the high-quality responses under positive supervision signals. In the subsequent MPO phase, we introduce additional supervision from both positive and negative samples, thereby further improving its overall abilities.
items.zh: 在原生多模态预训练之后，我们应用两阶段后训练策略来进一步增强模型的多模态对话和推理能力。该策略包括监督微调（SFT）和混合偏好优化（MPO）。在 SFT 阶段，模型被训练为在正监督信号下模仿高质量响应。在随后的 MPO 阶段，我们引入来自正负样本的额外监督，从而进一步提升其整体能力。

items.en: Supervised Fine-Tuning. In this phase, the techniques of random JPEG compression, square loss re-weighting, and multimodal data packing proposed in InternVL2.5 [18] are also employed in the InternVL3 series. The main advancement of the SFT phase in InternVL3 compared to InternVL2.5 lies in the use of higher-quality and more diverse training data. Specifically, we further extend training samples for tool usage, 3D scene understanding, GUI operations, long context tasks, video understanding, scientific diagrams, creative writing, and multimodal reasoning.
items.zh: 监督微调。在此阶段，InternVL2.5 [18] 中提出的随机 JPEG 压缩、平方损失重加权和多模态数据打包技术也被用于 InternVL3 系列。与 InternVL2.5 相比，InternVL3 的 SFT 阶段的主要进步在于使用了更高质量和更多样化的训练数据。具体地，我们进一步扩展了工具使用、3D 场景理解、GUI 操作、长上下文任务、视频理解、科学图表、创意写作和多模态推理的训练样本。

items.en: Mixed Preference Optimization. During Pre-training and SFT, the model is trained to predict the next token conditioned on previous ground-truth tokens. However, during inference, the model predicts each token based on its own prior outputs. This discrepancy between ground-truth tokens and model-predicted tokens introduces a distribution shift, which can impair the model’s Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning capabilities. To mitigate this issue, we employ Mixed Preference Optimization (MPO) [124], which introduces additional supervision from both positive and negative samples to align the model response distribution with the ground-truth distribution, thereby improving reasoning performance. Specifically, the training objective of MPO is a combination of preference loss ℒp\mathcal{L}_{p}, quality loss ℒq\mathcal{L}_{q}, and generation loss ℒg\mathcal{L}_{g}, which can be formulated as follows:
items.zh: 混合偏好优化。在预训练和 SFT 期间，模型被训练为基于先前真实 token 预测下一个 token。然而，在推理期间，模型基于自身先前的输出预测每个 token。真实 token 与模型预测 token 之间的这种差异引入了分布偏移，可能损害模型的思维链（CoT）推理能力。为了缓解这一问题，我们采用混合偏好优化（MPO）[124]，它从正负样本中引入额外监督，使模型响应分布与真实分布对齐，从而提高推理性能。具体地，MPO 的训练目标是偏好损失 Lp\mathcal{L}_{p}、质量损失 Lq\mathcal{L}_{q} 和生成损失 Lg\mathcal{L}_{g} 的组合，可公式化如下：

The policy model πθ\pi_{\theta} is initialized from model π0\pi_{0}. items.en: Data. For SFT data, we construct the training corpora based on those used in InternVL2.5 [18] while introducing additional tool usage, 3D scene understanding, GUI operations, scientific diagrams, creative writing, and multimodal reasoning samples. As a result, the number of training samples grows from 16.3M in InternVL2.5 to 21.7M in InternVL3. For MPO data, we construct preference pairs based on the data pipeline and samples proposed in MMPR v1.2 [124], which cover a wide range of domains, including general visual question answering (VQA) [43, 50, 90, 83, 127, 126], science [57, 16, 82], chart [91, 54, 11], mathematics [72, 104, 10, 81, 55, 40, 147, 106], OCR [92, 107, 9, 49, 96], and document [24]. We use the SFT versions of InternVL3-8B, 38B, and 78B to generate rollouts. During the MPO phase, all models are trained on the same dataset, which comprises about 300K samples.
items.zh: 数据。对于 SFT 数据，我们基于 InternVL2.5 [18] 中使用的训练语料库构建训练语料，同时引入额外的工具使用、3D 场景理解、GUI 操作、科学图表、创意写作和多模态推理样本。因此，训练样本数量从 InternVL2.5 的 1630 万增加到 InternVL3 的 2170 万。对于 MPO 数据，我们基于 MMPR v1.2 [124] 中提出的数据流水线和样本构建偏好对，涵盖广泛领域，包括通用视觉问答（VQA）[43, 50, 90, 83, 127, 126]、科学 [57, 16, 82]、图表 [91, 54, 11]、数学 [72, 104, 10, 81, 55, 40, 147, 106]、OCR [92, 107, 9, 49, 96] 和文档 [24]。我们使用 InternVL3-8B、38B 和 78B 的 SFT 版本生成 rollout。在 MPO 阶段，所有模型在相同数据集上训练，该数据集包含约 30 万样本。

items.en: Test-Time Scaling has been shown to be an effective method to enhance the reasoning abilities of LLMs and MLLMs [108, 94, 87, 70, 120, 36, 152, 125]. In this work, we use the Best-of-N evaluation strategy and employ VisualPRM-8B [125] as the critic model to select the best response for reasoning and mathematics evaluation.
items.zh: 测试时缩放已被证明是增强 LLM 和 MLLM 推理能力的有效方法 [108, 94, 87, 70, 120, 36, 152, 125]。在本工作中，我们使用 Best-of-N 评估策略，并采用 VisualPRM-8B [125] 作为评判模型，为推理和数学评估选择最佳响应。

items.en: Visual Process Reward Model. VisualPRM first assigns a quality score to each step of the given solution and then averages these scores to obtain the overall score for this solution. This process is formulated as a multi-turn chat task so that we can effectively leverage the generation ability of MLLMs. The image II, question qq, and the first step s0s_{0} of the step-by-step solution s={s0,s1,⋯,sn}∈𝒮s=\{s_{0},s_{1},\cdots,s_{n}\}\in\mathcal{S} to this question are included in the first turn and a new step is presented in each subsequent turn. During the training stage, the model is required to predict the correctness of the given step in each turn as follows:
items.zh: 视觉过程奖励模型。VisualPRM 首先为给定解决方案的每一步分配一个质量分数，然后平均这些分数以获得该解决方案的总分。此过程被公式化为多轮聊天任务，以便有效利用 MLLM 的生成能力。第一轮包含图像 II、问题 qq 和该问题的逐步解决方案 s={s0,s1,⋯,sn}∈Ss=\{s_{0},s_{1},\cdots,s_{n}\}\in\mathcal{S} 的第一步 s0s_{0}，后续每一轮呈现一个新步骤。在训练阶段，模型需要在每一轮预测给定步骤的正确性如下：

items.en: where ci∈{+,−}c_{i}\in\{+,-\} denotes the correctness of ii-th step. During the inference stage, the score for each step is defined as the probability of generating “++”.
items.zh: 其中 ci∈{+,−}c_{i}\in\{+,-\} 表示第 ii 步的正确性。在推理阶段，每一步的分数定义为生成“++”的概率。

items.en: Data. VisualPRM400K [125] is used to train VisualPRM, which is constructed based on multimodal questions collected from MMPR v1.2 [124]. Following the data pipeline in VisualPRM400K, we further expand VisualPRM400K by sampling rollouts from the 8B and 38B variants of InternVL3.
items.zh: 数据。VisualPRM400K [125] 用于训练 VisualPRM，该数据集基于从 MMPR v1.2 [124] 收集的多模态问题构建。遵循 VisualPRM400K 中的数据流水线，我们通过从 InternVL3 的 8B 和 38B 变体采样 rollout 进一步扩展了 VisualPRM400K。

items.en: To facilitate model training, we extend the InternEVO framework [15]—originally designed to optimize the Zero Redundancy Optimizer (ZeRO) for large-scale LLM training—to support the training of our InternVL models. This extension enables efficient scaling to hundreds of billions of parameters across thousands of GPUs. The enhanced framework introduces flexible and decoupled sharding strategies for the ViT, MLP, and LLM components, significantly improving training efficiency by overlapping communication and computation. It further supports a comprehensive range of parallelism strategies—including data, tensor, sequence, and pipeline parallelism—as well as their arbitrary combinations.
items.zh: 为了促进模型训练，我们扩展了 InternEVO 框架 [15]——最初设计用于优化大规模 LLM 训练的零冗余优化器（ZeRO）——以支持我们的 InternVL 模型的训练。这一扩展使得在数千个 GPU 上高效扩展到数千亿参数成为可能。增强后的框架为 ViT、MLP 和 LLM 组件引入了灵活且解耦的分片策略，通过重叠通信和计算显著提高了训练效率。它进一步支持全面的并行策略——包括数据、张量、序列和流水线并行——以及它们的任意组合。

items.en: A key challenge in MLLM training is the imbalance in computational load caused by the varying proportions of visual and textual tokens. Such imbalances can lead to inefficiencies by overburdening either the ViT or LLM modules. To address this, we introduce a suite of techniques that dynamically balance computational workloads across modules, ensuring efficient and equitable resource utilization.
items.zh: MLLM训练中的一个关键挑战是由视觉和文本token比例不同导致的计算负载不平衡。这种不平衡可能使ViT或LLM模块过载，从而降低效率。为解决此问题，我们引入了一套技术，可动态平衡各模块间的计算负载，确保高效且公平的资源利用。

items.en: For InternVL models of varying scales, the extended InternEVO framework formulates an optimization objective that identifies the optimal configuration to minimize both memory consumption and communication overhead across different module dimensions. To support sequences of up to 32K tokens, our approach incorporates both head-parallel and sequence-parallel techniques, effectively overcoming scalability bottlenecks while preserving computational efficiency. Compared to the training of InternVL2.5, the application of InternEVO in InternVL3 results in a training speedup of 50% to 200% for models of comparable size, given the same computational budget.
items.zh: 对于不同规模的InternVL模型，扩展的InternEVO框架制定了一个优化目标，用于确定最优配置，以最小化不同模块维度上的内存消耗和通信开销。为支持长达32K token的序列，我们的方法结合了头并行和序列并行技术，有效克服了可扩展性瓶颈，同时保持了计算效率。与InternVL2.5的训练相比，在相同计算预算下，InternVL3中应用InternEVO可使同等规模模型的训练速度提升50%至200%。

items.en: In this section, we first compare the overall multimodal capabilities of InternVL3 with those of current advanced MLLMs using widely adopted multimodal benchmarks. Subsequently, we evaluate the performance of InternVL3 in various domains, including multimodal reasoning, mathematics, optical character recognition (OCR), chart and document understanding, multi-image understanding, real-world comprehension, comprehensive multimodal evaluation, multimodal hallucination evaluation, visual grounding, multimodal multilingual understanding, video understanding, and other multimodal tasks, most of which were tested using VLMEvalKit [33]. Additionally, we provide a detailed evaluation of the language capabilities of InternVL3. Finally, we analyze the advantages of several key modifications in InternVL3 compared to its predecessor, InternVL2.5, including the naive multimodal pre-training, the V2PE positional encoding, and the improvements brought by the post-training technique.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先使用广泛采用的多模态基准测试，将InternVL3的整体多模态能力与当前先进MLLM进行比较。随后，我们评估InternVL3在多个领域的性能，包括多模态推理、数学、光学字符识别（OCR）、图表和文档理解、多图像理解、真实世界理解、综合多模态评估、多模态幻觉评估、视觉定位、多模态多语言理解、视频理解及其他多模态任务，其中大部分使用VLMEvalKit [33]进行测试。此外，我们还对InternVL3的语言能力进行了详细评估。最后，我们分析了InternVL3相对于其前身InternVL2.5的几项关键改进的优势，包括朴素多模态预训练、V2PE位置编码以及后训练技术带来的改进。

full.sec: 3.1 Overall Comparison to Other Advanced MLLMs
full.secZh: 3.1 与其他先进多模态大模型的整体对比

items.en: More specifically, InternVL3 achieves an impressive score of 72.2 on the MMMU benchmark, underscoring its superior capacity to manage complex multimodal challenges. Beyond its performance on MMMU, InternVL3 consistently outperforms earlier versions of the InternVL series on a variety of tasks, thereby emphasizing its broad applicability to real-world scenarios that require sophisticated multimodal comprehension and reasoning.
items.zh: 更具体地说，InternVL3在MMMU基准测试中取得了72.2的出色分数，突显了其处理复杂多模态挑战的卓越能力。除了在MMMU上的表现外，InternVL3在各种任务上始终优于InternVL系列的早期版本，从而强调了其在需要复杂多模态理解和推理的真实场景中的广泛适用性。

items.en: In addition to surpassing its open-source counterparts, InternVL3 exhibits competitive performance relative to leading closed-source commercial models, such as ChatGPT-4o-latest [98] and Claude-3.5 Sonnet [3]. In many cases, the performance gap between InternVL3 and these proprietary models is notably narrowed—and in certain benchmarks, such as AI2D and ChartQA, InternVL3 even surpasses them. Nonetheless, our results further reveal that Gemini2.5 Pro [117] maintains a performance edge on select tasks (e.g., on HallusionBench), indicating that despite the notable progress in InternVL3, there remains room for further refinement of our InternVL series.
items.zh: 除了超越开源对手外，InternVL3还展现出与领先闭源商业模型（如ChatGPT-4o-latest [98]和Claude-3.5 Sonnet [3]）相竞争的性能。在许多情况下，InternVL3与这些专有模型之间的性能差距显著缩小——在某些基准测试（如AI2D和ChartQA）中，InternVL3甚至超越了它们。尽管如此，我们的结果进一步显示，Gemini2.5 Pro [117]在特定任务（例如HallusionBench）上仍保持性能优势，这表明尽管InternVL3取得了显著进展，但我们的InternVL系列仍有进一步改进的空间。

items.en: To comprehensively evaluate the multimodal reasoning and mathematical capabilities of InternVL3, we conduct experiments on a series of benchmarks, including MMMU [141] for multidisciplinary reasoning, MathVista [80], MathVision [119], MathVerse [146] for mathematical reasoning, as well as DynaMath [155], WeMath [99] and LogicVista [131] for complementary evaluation on logical reasoning.
items.zh: 为全面评估InternVL3的多模态推理和数学能力，我们在多个基准测试上进行了实验，包括用于多学科推理的MMMU [141]、用于数学推理的MathVista [80]、MathVision [119]、MathVerse [146]，以及用于逻辑推理补充评估的DynaMath [155]、WeMath [99]和LogicVista [131]。

items.en: As shown in Table 2, InternVL3 exhibits strong performance across all tested benchmarks. Specifically, on the MMMU benchmark, InternVL3-based models consistently outperform smaller-scale competitors. For instance, with increasing model size, InternVL3-78B reaches a score over 72 on MMMU, indicating robust understanding and reasoning capability in handling abstract multidisciplinary concepts. In the mathematical domain, InternVL3 demonstrates significant gains across various benchmarks. On MathVista, InternVL3-78B records a performance close to 79.0, while on MathVision and MathVerse, the results are also competitive, evidencing the model’s enhanced ability to tackle challenging mathematical problems. Furthermore, performance on DynaMath, WeMath, and LogicVista consistently improves with scaling. The overall score—a mean calculated across all benchmarks—shows that InternVL3 models achieve a balanced enhancement across different aspects, surpassing many of the preceding open-source methods.
items.zh: 如表2所示，InternVL3在所有测试基准上均表现出强劲性能。具体而言，在MMMU基准测试上，基于InternVL3的模型始终优于较小规模的竞争对手。例如，随着模型规模增大，InternVL3-78B在MMMU上得分超过72，表明其在处理抽象多学科概念时具有稳健的理解和推理能力。在数学领域，InternVL3在各个基准测试上均取得了显著提升。在MathVista上，InternVL3-78B记录接近79.0的性能，而在MathVision和MathVerse上，结果也具有竞争力，证明了模型处理挑战性数学问题的能力增强。此外，在DynaMath、WeMath和LogicVista上的性能随Scaling持续提升。总分（所有基准测试的平均值）显示，InternVL3模型在不同方面实现了均衡增强，超越了许多先前的开源方法。

items.en: A notable characteristic of InternVL3 is the efficiency of the best-of-N evaluation strategy [125]. When applying this method, even models with relatively smaller parameter sizes (e.g., InternVL3-1B and InternVL3-2B) exhibit substantial improvements in reasoning performance. Specifically, in the Vision-Only split of MathVerse, the best-of-8 strategy leads to increases of approximately 6.0 and 3.2 percentage points for InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B, respectively. This improvement underscores the effectiveness of test-time scaling.
items.zh: InternVL3的一个显著特点是best-of-N评估策略[125]的效率。应用此方法时，即使参数规模相对较小的模型（如InternVL3-1B和InternVL3-2B）在推理性能上也表现出显著提升。具体而言，在MathVerse的纯视觉部分，best-of-8策略使InternVL3-38B和InternVL3-78B分别提升了约6.0和3.2个百分点。这一改进突显了测试时Scaling的有效性。

items.en: To assess the model’s integrated vision–language understanding in tasks involving text, document, and chart comprehension, we perform a comprehensive evaluation over nine benchmarks, including AI2D [57], ChartQA [91], TextVQA [107], DocVQA [93], InfoVQA [92], OCRBench [76], SEED-2-Plus [61], CharXiv [128], and VCR [148]. As illustrated in Table 3, the InternVL3 series not only maintains robust performance across these benchmarks but also demonstrates competitive or superior results when compared to other open-source and closed-source counterparts.
items.zh: 为评估模型在涉及文本、文档和图表理解任务中的集成视觉-语言理解能力，我们在九个基准测试上进行了全面评估，包括AI2D [57]、ChartQA [91]、TextVQA [107]、DocVQA [93]、InfoVQA [92]、OCRBench [76]、SEED-2-Plus [61]、CharXiv [128]和VCR [148]。如表3所示，InternVL3系列不仅在这些基准测试上保持了稳健性能，而且与其他开源和闭源对手相比，展现出具有竞争力或更优的结果。

items.en: At the 1B scale, InternVL3-1B achieves performance that is roughly on par with previous lower-scale models. At the 2B scale, InternVL3-2B not only improves its absolute scores—for instance, reaching 78.7/87.4 on AI2D and 88.3 on DocVQA—but also exhibits a performance edge over similarly parameterized models such as Qwen2-VL-2B [121]. Although its TextVQA performance (77.0) remains comparable to that of Qwen2-VL-2B, the enhancements in document and chart understanding suggest that the proposed native multimodal pre-training are particularly effective in tasks requiring precise visual–textual integration.
items.zh: 在1B规模上，InternVL3-1B实现了与先前较低规模模型大致相当的性能。在2B规模上，InternVL3-2B不仅提高了绝对分数——例如，在AI2D上达到78.7/87.4，在DocVQA上达到88.3——而且在与类似参数规模的模型（如Qwen2-VL-2B [121]）相比时也展现出性能优势。尽管其TextVQA性能（77.0）仍与Qwen2-VL-2B相当，但在文档和图表理解方面的增强表明，所提出的原生多模态预训练在需要精确视觉-文本整合的任务中特别有效。

items.en: The benefits of the new pre-training protocol become even more pronounced at larger scales. Mid-scale models like InternVL3-8B and InternVL3-9B deliver substantial gains, with InternVL3-8B achieving 85.2/92.6 on AI2D, 92.7 on DocVQA, and VCR scores of 94.5/98.1. Moreover, when compared with heavyweight systems such as Qwen2-VL-72B [121] or even closed-source models like GPT-4o-20240513 [97], the high-scale variants of InternVL3—particularly InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B—push the envelope further. For instance, InternVL3-78B attains a remarkable OCRBench score of 906 and VCR scores of 96.0/98.6, clearly surpassing the corresponding metrics of comparable models.
items.zh: 新预训练协议的优势在更大规模上变得更加明显。中等规模模型如InternVL3-8B和InternVL3-9B带来了显著提升，InternVL3-8B在AI2D上达到85.2/92.6，在DocVQA上达到92.7，VCR分数为94.5/98.1。此外，与重量级系统如Qwen2-VL-72B [121]甚至闭源模型如GPT-4o-20240513 [97]相比，InternVL3的高规模变体——特别是InternVL3-38B和InternVL3-78B——进一步突破了极限。例如，InternVL3-78B在OCRBench上取得了906的出色分数，VCR分数为96.0/98.6，明显超越了可比模型的相应指标。

items.en: we evaluate the multi-image relation perception and understanding capabilities of InternVL3 across a suite of widely recognized benchmarks, including BLINK [39], Mantis-Eval [51], MMIU [95], MuirBench [118], MMT-Bench [137], and MIRB [153], as presented in Table 4. These benchmarks comprehensively assess skills such as cross-image reasoning and context integration, all of which are crucial for effective multimodal interaction.
items.zh: 我们在一系列广泛认可的基准测试上评估了InternVL3的多图像关系感知和理解能力，包括BLINK [39]、Mantis-Eval [51]、MMIU [95]、MuirBench [118]、MMT-Bench [137]和MIRB [153]，如表4所示。这些基准测试全面评估了跨图像推理和上下文整合等技能，这些对于有效的多模态交互至关重要。

items.en: InternVL3 consistently outperforms its earlier counterparts across different parameter scales. For instance, at the 1B scale, InternVL3-1B exhibits a modest yet consistent improvement over preceding models, achieving a BLINK score of 42.9 and an MMT-Bench score of 52.9. The performance gains become even more pronounced at the 2B scale; InternVL3-2B attains a remarkable 65.9 on Mantis-Eval, representing an improvement of over 11 points relative to InternVL2.5-2B, and also boosts its MMT-Bench performance to 59.5. Such enhancements indicate that the advanced pre-training strategies and enhanced training datasets in InternVL3 significantly elevate its capability to capture and reason over inter-image relationships.
items.zh: InternVL3在不同参数规模上始终优于其早期版本。例如，在1B规模上，InternVL3-1B相对于先前模型表现出适度但一致的改进，BLINK得分为42.9，MMT-Bench得分为52.9。在2B规模上，性能提升更为显著；InternVL3-2B在Mantis-Eval上达到65.9，相对于InternVL2.5-2B提升了超过11分，并将MMT-Bench性能提升至59.5。这些改进表明，InternVL3中先进的预训练策略和增强的训练数据集显著提升了其捕捉和推理图像间关系的能力。

items.en: At higher scales, the trend continues. InternVL3-8B and its subsequent larger variants not only secure steady improvements on BLINK and MMT-Bench but also demonstrate substantial gains on the MIRB and MuirBench benchmarks. In particular, InternVL3-78B reaches a BLINK score of 66.3 and an MMT-Bench score of 73.2, positioning it as a competitive alternative to leading closed-source models like GPT-4o. These results suggest that the learning multimodal capabilities via native multimodal pre-training and the scaling of model parameters are key contributors to the elevated performance observed across diverse evaluation settings. Despite these encouraging outcomes, a noticeable performance gap between our InternVL3 and other MLLMs like Qwen2.5-VL still exists on certain benchmarks, such as MuirBench, implying that future work may benefit from further enhancements in training data curation and additional model refinements.
items.zh: 在更高规模上，这一趋势持续。InternVL3-8B及其后续更大变体不仅在BLINK和MMT-Bench上稳步提升，而且在MIRB和MuirBench基准测试上也取得了显著提升。特别是，InternVL3-78B在BLINK上达到66.3，在MMT-Bench上达到73.2，使其成为领先闭源模型（如GPT-4o）的有竞争力替代方案。这些结果表明，通过原生多模态预训练学习多模态能力以及模型参数的Scaling是不同评估设置中观察到的性能提升的关键因素。尽管取得了这些令人鼓舞的成果，但在某些基准测试（如MuirBench）上，我们的InternVL3与其他MLLM（如Qwen2.5-VL）之间仍存在明显的性能差距，这表明未来的工作可能受益于训练数据整理的进一步改进和额外的模型优化。

items.en: We evaluate the InternVL3 series on four real-world comprehension benchmarks—RealWorldQA [27], MME-RealWorld [151], WildVision [86], and R-Bench [62]—to assess its ability to tackle realistic and complex tasks. As shown in Table 4, even the smallest variant in the InternVL3 family (InternVL3-1B) demonstrates promising performance with a RealWorldQA score of 58.2, an MME-RealWorld score of 46.0, a WildVision win rate of 43.8, and an R-Bench score of 60.4. Scaling up the model yields further enhancements across all metrics. Mid-sized variants such as InternVL3-8B and InternVL3-14B continue this positive trend, with InternVL3-8B reporting a RealWorldQA score of 70.8 and an R-Bench score of 74.1. These improvements highlight the effectiveness of scaling, as larger models provide more robust representations and enhanced comprehension capabilities in real-world scenarios.
items.zh: 我们在四个真实世界理解基准测试——RealWorldQA [27]、MME-RealWorld [151]、WildVision [86]和R-Bench [62]——上评估了InternVL3系列，以评估其处理现实复杂任务的能力。如表4所示，即使InternVL3系列中最小的变体（InternVL3-1B）也展现出有希望的性能，RealWorldQA得分为58.2，MME-RealWorld得分为46.0，WildVision胜率为43.8，R-Bench得分为60.4。扩大模型规模在所有指标上带来了进一步增强。中等规模变体如InternVL3-8B和InternVL3-14B延续了这一积极趋势，InternVL3-8B报告RealWorldQA得分为70.8，R-Bench得分为74.1。这些改进突显了Scaling的有效性，因为更大的模型在真实场景中提供了更稳健的表示和增强的理解能力。

items.en: At the higher end of the scale, the InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B models achieve top-tier results among the InternVL3 series. Notably, InternVL3-78B records a RealWorldQA score of 78.0, an MME-RealWorld score of 65.4, a WildVision win rate of 73.6, and an R-Bench score of 77.4. When compared with competitive models, such as GPT-4o [97]—which scores 75.4 on RealWorldQA and 80.6 on WildVision—the InternVL3 series exhibits competitive strengths. InternVL3-78B not only surpasses GPT-4o on RealWorldQA and closely matches its R-Bench performance but also considerably outperforms it on MME-RealWorld, indicating an overall robust performance on tasks demanding both perceptual precision and comprehensive understanding.
items.zh: 在规模的高端，InternVL3-38B和InternVL3-78B模型在InternVL3系列中取得了顶级结果。值得注意的是，InternVL3-78B记录了RealWorldQA得分78.0，MME-RealWorld得分65.4，WildVision胜率73.6，R-Bench得分77.4。与竞争模型（如GPT-4o [97]，其在RealWorldQA上得分为75.4，在WildVision上得分为80.6）相比，InternVL3系列展现出竞争实力。InternVL3-78B不仅在RealWorldQA上超越了GPT-4o，并在R-Bench上与其性能接近，而且在MME-RealWorld上显著优于它，表明其在需要感知精度和全面理解的任务上整体表现稳健。

items.en: The comprehensive multimodal evaluation is based on established benchmarks including MME [37], MMBench (evaluating both English and Chinese tasks) [75], MMBench v1.1 (English) [75], MMVet [138], MMVet v2 [139], and MMStar [13], as summarized in Table 5. Specifically, InternVL3-1B achieves an MMBench score of 72.6/67.9 (English/Chinese) and improves the MMBench v1.1 score to 69.9, compared to the InternVL2.5-1B baseline (70.7/66.3 and 68.4, respectively). The improvements become more pronounced at the 2B scale, where InternVL3-2B records an MME of 2221.2 and reaches an MMBench performance of 81.1/78.4, along with an MMBench v1.1 score of 78.6.
items.zh: 综合多模态评估基于既定基准测试，包括MME [37]、MMBench（评估英文和中文任务）[75]、MMBench v1.1（英文）[75]、MMVet [138]、MMVet v2 [139]和MMStar [13]，总结于表5。具体而言，InternVL3-1B在MMBench上得分为72.6/67.9（英文/中文），并将MMBench v1.1得分提升至69.9，而InternVL2.5-1B基线分别为70.7/66.3和68.4。在2B规模上，改进更为显著，InternVL3-2B记录MME为2221.2，MMBench性能达到81.1/78.4，MMBench v1.1得分为78.6。

items.en: At larger scales, InternVL3 models consistently demonstrate superior performance. For example, the InternVL3-8B model achieves an MME of 2415.4, while the InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B models record MME scores of 2523.6 and 2549.8, respectively. The corresponding MMBench and MMBench v1.1 scores also show steady improvements, with InternVL3-78B attaining 89.0/88.7 for English/Chinese and 87.7 for English-only tasks. When compared with other competitive models, such as Qwen2-VL-72B and Qwen2.5-VL-72B, the InternVL3 series—especially the 78B variant—offers a consistent performance advantage on the multimodal understanding benchmarks.
items.zh: 在更大规模上，InternVL3模型持续展现出优越性能。例如，InternVL3-8B模型MME达到2415.4，而InternVL3-38B和InternVL3-78B模型分别记录MME得分为2523.6和2549.8。相应的MMBench和MMBench v1.1得分也稳步提升，InternVL3-78B在英文/中文上达到89.0/88.7，在纯英文任务上达到87.7。与其他竞争模型（如Qwen2-VL-72B和Qwen2.5-VL-72B）相比，InternVL3系列——尤其是78B变体——在多模态理解基准测试上提供了持续的性能优势。

items.en: We evaluate InternVL’s propensity for hallucinations on four established benchmarks—HallusionBench [45], MMHal-Bench [111], CRPE [126], and POPE [67]—as detailed in Table 5. In comparison with previous InternVL series, the new InternVL3 models demonstrate overall competitive performance across varying scales, while providing consistent improvements in handling multimodal hallucination challenges. In the small-parameter regime, InternVL3-1B attains a HallusionBench score of 41.4, representing an appreciable gain over the InternVL2.5-1B baseline, which scored 39.0. Similarly, the 2B variant of InternVL3 shows a comparable HallusionBench performance (42.5) to its InternVL2.5 counterpart (42.6), while registering a modest improvement in CRPE performance (71.5 vs. 70.2).
items.zh: 我们在四个既定基准测试——HallusionBench [45]、MMHal-Bench [111]、CRPE [126]和POPE [67]——上评估了InternVL的幻觉倾向，详见表5。与之前的InternVL系列相比，新的InternVL3模型在不同规模上展现出整体竞争性能，同时在处理多模态幻觉挑战方面提供了持续改进。在小参数范围内，InternVL3-1B在HallusionBench上得分为41.4，相对于InternVL2.5-1B基线（39.0）有显著提升。类似地，InternVL3的2B变体在HallusionBench上的表现（42.5）与其InternVL2.5对应版本（42.6）相当，同时在CRPE性能上略有提升（71.5对70.2）。

items.en: In the large-scale setting, InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B are particularly noteworthy. InternVL3-38B obtains a HallusionBench score of 57.1, while InternVL3-78B reaches 59.1, accompanied by a CRPE improvement to 79.2. These figures position the InternVL3 series as competitive with leading closed- and open-source models such as GPT-4o and the Qwen2.5-VL series. Despite these advancements, minor declines on certain benchmarks, such as MMHal, indicate that although the InternVL3 series has made overall progress, optimizing data and training strategies to achieve more consistent improvements remains an important direction for future work.
items.zh: 在大规模设置中，InternVL3-38B和InternVL3-78B尤为值得关注。InternVL3-38B在HallusionBench上得分为57.1，而InternVL3-78B达到59.1，同时CRPE提升至79.2。这些数字使InternVL3系列与领先的闭源和开源模型（如GPT-4o和Qwen2.5-VL系列）具有竞争力。尽管取得了这些进展，但在某些基准测试（如MMHal）上的轻微下降表明，尽管InternVL3系列取得了整体进步，但优化数据和训练策略以实现更一致的改进仍是未来工作的重要方向。

items.en: We evaluate InternVL’s visual grounding capability on the RefCOCO [56], RefCOCO+[56], and RefCOCOg[88] datasets, where the model is tasked with accurately localizing target objects in images from given textual descriptions. Table 6 shows a comprehensive comparison across various models, including several specialized grounding models as well as multiple MLLLMs.
items.zh: 我们在 RefCOCO [56]、RefCOCO+ [56] 和 RefCOCOg [88] 数据集上评估 InternVL 的视觉定位能力，模型需要根据给定的文本描述在图像中准确定位目标对象。表 6 展示了多种模型的全面比较，包括几个专门的定位模型以及多个多模态大语言模型。

items.en: Among the smaller-scale models, we observe that while Qwen2.5-VL-3B achieves an average score of 85.0, the InternVL3-1B and InternVL3-2B models yield average scores of 81.6 and 86.7, respectively. Notably, when scaling up, the InternVL3 series exhibits promising improvements. InternVL3-8B, InternVL3-9B, and InternVL3-14B yield average scores around 88.2–89.6, reflecting a consistent trend of performance gains as the model size increases. However, when reaching larger scales, the performance gains appear to plateau. For instance, InternVL2.5-78B reaches an average score of 92.3, and InternVL3-78B only shows a score of 91.4. We speculate that this is because InternVL3’s training data expansion does not include additional grounding-specific data and the relative reduction in grounding-targeted data could have restricted the localization capabilities.
items.zh: 在较小规模的模型中，我们观察到 Qwen2.5-VL-3B 的平均得分为 85.0，而 InternVL3-1B 和 InternVL3-2B 的平均得分分别为 81.6 和 86.7。值得注意的是，当规模扩大时，InternVL3 系列表现出有希望的改进。InternVL3-8B、InternVL3-9B 和 InternVL3-14B 的平均得分约为 88.2–89.6，反映了随着模型规模增大性能持续提升的趋势。然而，当达到更大规模时，性能提升似乎趋于平稳。例如，InternVL2.5-78B 的平均得分为 92.3，而 InternVL3-78B 仅显示 91.4 的得分。我们推测这是因为 InternVL3 的训练数据扩展没有包含额外的定位特定数据，并且定位目标数据的相对减少可能限制了定位能力。

items.en: We assess InternVL’s multimodal multilingual understanding capabilities using benchmarks—MMMB, Multilingual MMBench [109], and MTVQA [113]—as shown in Table 7. The InternVL3 series demonstrates consistent improvements in multilingual performance compared to previous predecessors. For example, the lightweight InternVL3-1B already shows a modest improvement over InternVL2.5-1B, while the larger-scale variants, such as InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B, achieve significantly higher average scores across all three benchmarks.
items.zh: 我们使用基准 MMMB、Multilingual MMBench [109] 和 MTVQA [113] 评估 InternVL 的多模态多语言理解能力，如表 7 所示。与之前的版本相比，InternVL3 系列在多语言性能上表现出一致的改进。例如，轻量级 InternVL3-1B 已经显示出比 InternVL2.5-1B 适度的改进，而更大规模的变体，如 InternVL3-38B 和 InternVL3-78B，在所有三个基准上取得了显著更高的平均得分。

items.en: Comparisons with other leading models further highlight the effectiveness of the InternVL3 series. Notably, the InternVL3 variants achieve performance that is competitive with or superior to models such as Qwen2-VL-72B [121] and Qwen2.5-VL-72B [6]. Overall, the enhanced performance of the InternVL3 series across MMMB, Multilingual MMBench, and MTVQA underscores the promise of our approach in advancing global multimodal applications.
items.zh: 与其他领先模型的比较进一步凸显了 InternVL3 系列的有效性。值得注意的是，InternVL3 变体实现了与 Qwen2-VL-72B [121] 和 Qwen2.5-VL-72B [6] 等模型竞争或更优的性能。总体而言，InternVL3 系列在 MMMB、Multilingual MMBench 和 MTVQA 上的增强性能强调了我们的方法在推进全球多模态应用方面的前景。

items.en: Video understanding is essential for evaluating how well MLLMs capture temporal and multimodal cues in complex video content. In this work, we assess the InternVL3 series on six established benchmarks—Video-MME [38], MVBench [65], MMBench-Video [35], MLVU [154], LongVideoBench [129], and CG-Bench [2], as detailed in Table 8.
items.zh: 视频理解对于评估多模态大语言模型在复杂视频内容中捕捉时间和多模态线索的能力至关重要。在这项工作中，我们在六个既定基准上评估 InternVL3 系列——Video-MME [38]、MVBench [65]、MMBench-Video [35]、MLVU [154]、LongVideoBench [129] 和 CG-Bench [2]，详见表 8。

items.en: Overall, the InternVL3 models demonstrate clear performance improvements and a strong scalability trend over their predecessors. As the model capacity increases, the performance gains become more pronounced. For instance, InternVL3-2B records higher Video-MME scores (58.9/61.4) and improved MVBench and MLVU performance compared to the earlier 2B variants.
items.zh: 总体而言，InternVL3 模型表现出明显的性能改进和相对于其前身的强可扩展性趋势。随着模型容量的增加，性能提升变得更加显著。例如，与早期的 2B 变体相比，InternVL3-2B 记录了更高的 Video-MME 得分（58.9/61.4）以及改进的 MVBench 和 MLVU 性能。

items.en: The scaling behavior of the InternVL3 series is further evident in the larger models. InternVL3-14B attains a Video-MME score of 70.4/73.0, while InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B push these metrics even higher, reaching scores of 72.7/75.0 and 72.7/75.7, respectively. Additionally, the inclusion of CG-Bench evaluations for the InternVL3 series provides further insight into long-range video reasoning, with performance steadily improving as model size increases—for example, InternVL3-78B attains 48.4/65.3 on CG-Bench.
items.zh: InternVL3 系列的缩放行为在更大模型中进一步显现。InternVL3-14B 获得了 70.4/73.0 的 Video-MME 得分，而 InternVL3-38B 和 InternVL3-78B 将这些指标推得更高，分别达到 72.7/75.0 和 72.7/75.7。此外，InternVL3 系列包含 CG-Bench 评估进一步提供了对长程视频推理的洞察，性能随着模型规模增大而稳步提升——例如，InternVL3-78B 在 CG-Bench 上达到 48.4/65.3。

items.en: When compared with other open-source models, the InternVL3 series demonstrates competitive advantages. For instance, while Qwen2.5-VL models achieve impressive results (with Qwen2.5-VL-72B scoring 73.3/79.1 on Video-MME), the InternVL3 series tends to outperform them in other metrics, such as MVBench and MLVU. Similarly, while closed-source systems like Gemini-1.5-Pro sometimes yield superior results on select benchmarks (e.g., Video-MME), the overall performance of InternVL3, especially at larger scales, is highly competitive.
items.zh: 与其他开源模型相比，InternVL3 系列表现出竞争优势。例如，虽然 Qwen2.5-VL 模型取得了令人印象深刻的结果（Qwen2.5-VL-72B 在 Video-MME 上得分为 73.3/79.1），但 InternVL3 系列在其他指标（如 MVBench 和 MLVU）上往往优于它们。类似地，虽然像 Gemini-1.5-Pro 这样的闭源系统在某些基准（例如 Video-MME）上有时产生更优的结果，但 InternVL3 的整体性能，尤其是在更大规模下，具有很强的竞争力。

items.en: GUI grounding requires precise localization and understanding of interface elements, which is critical for applications like automated UI testing and assistive technologies. In Table 9, we report the performance on GUI grounding benchmarks, comparing InternVL3 with state-of-the-art multimodal and GUI-specific models. The results demonstrate that InternVL3 achieves competitive performance across different scales. On ScreenSpot [22], InternVL3-72B achieves 88.7% accuracy, slightly outperforming UI-TARS-72B [100] (88.4%) and Qwen2.5-VL-72B (87.1%), while Aguvis-72B [132] leads with 89.2%. Notably, InternVL3-38B (85.6%) surpasses GPT-4o (18.1%) and Gemini 2.0 (84.0%) by a significant margin.
items.zh: GUI 定位需要精确的定位和对界面元素的理解，这对于自动化 UI 测试和辅助技术等应用至关重要。在表 9 中，我们报告了 GUI 定位基准上的性能，将 InternVL3 与最先进的多模态和 GUI 特定模型进行比较。结果表明，InternVL3 在不同规模上实现了有竞争力的性能。在 ScreenSpot [22] 上，InternVL3-72B 达到 88.7% 的准确率，略优于 UI-TARS-72B [100]（88.4%）和 Qwen2.5-VL-72B（87.1%），而 Aguvis-72B [132] 以 89.2% 领先。值得注意的是，InternVL3-38B（85.6%）显著超过了 GPT-4o（18.1%）和 Gemini 2.0（84.0%）。

items.en: For the more challenging ScreenSpot-V2 [130] benchmark, InternVL3 exhibits strong scaling behavior: InternVL3-72B achieves 90.9%, outperforming UI-TARS-72B (90.3%). The 8B variant (81.4%) already surpasses UI-TARS-72B, while the 38B model (88.3%) further closes the gap to the 72B version. These results highlight InternVL3’s robustness in GUI understanding tasks, particularly in handling complex screen layouts and dynamic interfaces. The performance improvements with model scale suggest that larger architectures better capture the fine-grained visual-textual alignments required for precise GUI grounding. The superior performance of the InternVL3 models highlights their robustness in interpreting complex visual layouts. Future work will explore extending these capabilities to more dynamic and interactive GUI environments.
items.zh: 对于更具挑战性的 ScreenSpot-V2 [130] 基准，InternVL3 表现出强烈的缩放行为：InternVL3-72B 达到 90.9%，优于 UI-TARS-72B（90.3%）。8B 变体（81.4%）已经超过了 UI-TARS-72B，而 38B 模型（88.3%）进一步缩小了与 72B 版本的差距。这些结果凸显了 InternVL3 在 GUI 理解任务中的鲁棒性，特别是在处理复杂屏幕布局和动态界面方面。随着模型规模的性能提升表明，更大的架构更好地捕捉了精确 GUI 定位所需的细粒度视觉-文本对齐。InternVL3 模型的优越性能凸显了它们在解释复杂视觉布局方面的鲁棒性。未来工作将探索将这些能力扩展到更动态和交互式的 GUI 环境。

items.en: Spatial reasoning involves constructing a mental representation of a three-dimensional environment from visual inputs—a capability that is vital for applications such as autonomous driving. Table 10 reports the performance results on the Visual-Spatial Intelligence Benchmark (VSI-Bench) [134], where InternVL3 is compared against other state-of-the-art MLLMs. The results clearly indicate that InternVL3 outperforms its competitors in spatial reasoning tasks. In particular, the InternVL3-8B variant achieves a score of 42.1, leading all open-source MLLMs in the benchmark. Moreover, the InternVL3-38B and InternVL3-78B variants score 48.9 and 48.4, respectively—both superior to proprietary models such as GPT-4o, Gemini-1.5 Flash, and Gemini-1.5 Pro.
items.zh: 空间推理涉及从视觉输入构建三维环境的心理表征——这一能力对于自动驾驶等应用至关重要。表 10 报告了视觉空间智能基准（VSI-Bench）[134] 上的性能结果，其中 InternVL3 与其他最先进的多模态大语言模型进行了比较。结果清楚地表明，InternVL3 在空间推理任务上优于其竞争对手。特别是，InternVL3-8B 变体得分为 42.1，在该基准中领先所有开源多模态大语言模型。此外，InternVL3-38B 和 InternVL3-78B 变体分别得分为 48.9 和 48.4——均优于专有模型如 GPT-4o、Gemini-1.5 Flash 和 Gemini-1.5 Pro。

items.en: Furthermore, InternVL3 exhibits exceptional performance in several sub-category tasks within the benchmark. It attains a score of 71.2 in object counting, 53.7 in absolute distance estimation, 55.9 in relative distance estimation, and 54.5 in appearance order prediction, demonstrating its robust spatial reasoning capabilities. These promising results underscore the potential of InternVL3 for advancing 3D scene understanding, and future work will explore its integration into various downstream applications.
items.zh: 此外，InternVL3 在基准内的几个子类别任务中表现出卓越的性能。它在物体计数中得分为 71.2，绝对距离估计中为 53.7，相对距离估计中为 55.9，外观顺序预测中为 54.5，展示了其强大的空间推理能力。这些有希望的结果强调了 InternVL3 在推进 3D 场景理解方面的潜力，未来工作将探索其集成到各种下游应用中。

items.en: In particular, the experiments conducted compare the performance of Qwen2.5 chat models against corresponding InternVL3 variants. Both model series share the same pre-trained Qwen2.5 base model as their initialization. After undergoing native multimodal pre-training followed by additional post-training, the InternVL3 series consistently demonstrates superior performance over the Qwen2.5 chat models across most evaluation benchmarks.
items.zh: 特别是，进行的实验比较了 Qwen2.5 chat 模型与相应 InternVL3 变体的性能。两个模型系列共享相同的预训练 Qwen2.5 基础模型作为初始化。经过原生多模态预训练后接着额外的后训练，InternVL3 系列在大多数评估基准上始终表现出优于 Qwen2.5 chat 模型的性能。

items.en: This observed enhancement in language capabilities primarily arises from several factors, including the integration of approximately 25% pure-language data, joint parameter optimization during native multimodal pre-training, and the extensive use of high-quality textual corpora during the subsequent post-training stage. Such an approach not only strengthens multimodal comprehension but also significantly enhances language proficiency. Consequently, even when derived from identical pre-trained base models, the integrated multimodal and pure-text training strategy employed by InternVL3 results in substantially improved performance in language capabilities compared to the specialized training pipeline designed for pure-text tasks used by the Qwen2.5 chat models.
items.zh: 这种观察到的语言能力增强主要源于几个因素，包括整合了约 25% 的纯语言数据、原生多模态预训练期间的联合参数优化，以及后续后训练阶段广泛使用高质量文本语料库。这种方法不仅增强了多模态理解，还显著提高了语言熟练度。因此，即使源自相同的预训练基础模型，InternVL3 采用的集成多模态和纯文本训练策略相比 Qwen2.5 chat 模型为纯文本任务设计的专门训练流程，在语言能力上产生了显著改进的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Performance comparison on multimodal benchmarks under different training strategies. Native multimodal pre-training endows MLLMs with strong multimodal capabilities, even without further post-training.
items.capZh: 图 3：不同训练策略下多模态基准的性能比较。原生多模态预训练赋予多模态大语言模型强大的多模态能力，即使没有进一步的后训练。

items.en: The Effectiveness of Native Multimodal Pre-Training. To assess the effectiveness of native multimodal pre-training, we conduct experiments on the InternVL2-8B model while keeping its architecture, initialization parameters, and training data entirely unchanged. Traditionally, InternVL2-8B employs a training pipeline that begins with an MLP warmup phase for multimodal alignment, followed by an instruction-tuning stage. In our experiments, we substitute the conventional MLP warmup phase with our native multimodal pre-training process. This modification isolates the contribution of native multimodal pre-training to the overall multimodal capability of the model.
items.zh: 原生多模态预训练的有效性。为了评估原生多模态预训练的有效性，我们在 InternVL2-8B 模型上进行实验，同时保持其架构、初始化参数和训练数据完全不变。传统上，InternVL2-8B 采用从 MLP 预热阶段开始进行多模态对齐，然后是指令微调阶段的训练流程。在我们的实验中，我们用原生多模态预训练过程替换了传统的 MLP 预热阶段。这种修改隔离了原生多模态预训练对模型整体多模态能力的贡献。

items.en: The evaluation results in Figure 3 show that the model with native multimodal pre-training exhibits performance on most benchmarks that is comparable to the fully multi-stage-trained InternVL2-8B baseline. Furthermore, when followed by instruction tuning on higher-quality data, the model demonstrates further performance gains across evaluated multimodal tasks. These findings underscore the efficiency of native multimodal pre-training in imparting powerful multimodal capabilities to MLLMs.
items.zh: 图 3 中的评估结果显示，具有原生多模态预训练的模型在大多数基准上的性能与完全多阶段训练的 InternVL2-8B 基线相当。此外，当在更高质量数据上进行指令微调后，该模型在评估的多模态任务上表现出进一步的性能提升。这些发现强调了原生多模态预训练在赋予多模态大语言模型强大多模态能力方面的效率。

items.en: The Evaluation of Variable Visual Position Encoding. To promote the multimodal capabilities in long-context scenarios, InternVL3 employs Variable Visual Position Encoding (V2PE) in its visual embedding. However, in the original V2PE [42], this specialized positional encoding for visual tokens did not yield benefits on multimodal tasks with moderate context lengths. To further explore the efficacy of V2PE in a broader setting, we incorporated it during the native multimodal pre-training stage and evaluated the InternVL3-8B pre-trained model on standard multimodal benchmarks.
items.zh: 可变视觉位置编码的评估。为了促进长上下文场景中的多模态能力，InternVL3 在其视觉嵌入中采用了可变视觉位置编码（V2PE）。然而，在原始的 V2PE [42] 中，这种针对视觉 token 的专门位置编码在中等上下文长度的多模态任务上并未带来收益。为了进一步探索 V2PE 在更广泛设置中的功效，我们在原生多模态预训练阶段将其纳入，并在标准多模态基准上评估了 InternVL3-8B 预训练模型。

items.en: As reported in Table 12, the introduction of V2PE leads to significant performance gains across most evaluation metrics. In addition, our ablation studies—by varying the positional increment δ\delta—reveal that even for tasks primarily involving short contexts, relatively small δ\delta values can achieve optimal performance. These findings provide important insights for future efforts aimed at refining position encoding strategies for visual tokens in MLLMs. It is important to note that, to ensure fair comparisons, all results elsewhere in this report maintain a fixed δ=1\delta=1, except for the experimental results presented in Table 12.
items.zh: 如表 12 所示，V2PE 的引入在大多数评估指标上带来了显著的性能提升。此外，我们的消融研究——通过改变位置增量 δ——揭示，即使对于主要涉及短上下文的任务，相对较小的 δ 值也能实现最优性能。这些发现为未来旨在改进多模态大语言模型中视觉 token 位置编码策略的努力提供了重要见解。需要注意的是，为确保公平比较，本报告中的所有其他结果均保持固定的 δ=1，除了表 12 中呈现的实验结果。

items.en: Mixed Preference Optimization. Here, we demonstrate the effectiveness of MPO. As shown in Table 13, models fine-tuned with MPO demonstrate superior reasoning performance across seven multimodal reasoning benchmarks compared to their counterparts without MPO. Specifically, InternVL3-78B and InternVL3-38B outperform their counterparts by 4.1 and 4.5 points, respectively. Notably, the training data used for MPO is a subset of that used for SFT, indicating that the performance improvements primarily stem from the training algorithm rather than the training data.
items.zh: 混合偏好优化。这里，我们展示了 MPO 的有效性。如表 13 所示，与没有 MPO 的对应模型相比，使用 MPO 微调的模型在七个多模态推理基准上表现出更优的推理性能。具体来说，InternVL3-78B 和 InternVL3-38B 分别比其对应模型高出 4.1 和 4.5 分。值得注意的是，用于 MPO 的训练数据是用于 SFT 的数据的子集，表明性能提升主要源于训练算法而非训练数据。

items.en: We have introduced InternVL3, a significant advancement in the InternVL series that implements a native multimodal pre-training paradigm. By jointly learning linguistic and multimodal capabilities during the pre-training phase, InternVL3 avoids the training complexities and optimization challenges typically associated with post-hoc MLLM training pipelines. Through the incorporation of variable visual position encoding (V2PE) for extended multimodal contexts, advanced post-training strategies—such as supervised fine-tuning and mixed preference optimization—and test-time scaling, InternVL3 establishes a new open-source benchmark across a wide range of multimodal tasks, while simultaneously preserving robust linguistic competencies. Notably, InternVL3-78B attains a 72.2-point score on the MMMU benchmark, exceeding previous open-source MLLMs and reducing the performance gap relative to leading proprietary counterparts (e.g., Gemini-2.5 Pro). In line with our commitment to fostering community-driven innovation in multimodal large language models, we will publicly release InternVL3’s training data and model weights, thereby encouraging further research and development in this rapidly evolving field.
items.zh: 我们推出了InternVL3，这是InternVL系列的一项重大进展，它实现了一种原生多模态预训练范式。通过在预训练阶段联合学习语言和多模态能力，InternVL3避免了事后多模态大语言模型训练流程中常见的训练复杂性和优化挑战。通过引入可变视觉位置编码（V2PE）以支持扩展的多模态上下文，结合先进的后训练策略——如监督微调和混合偏好优化——以及测试时缩放，InternVL3在广泛的多模态任务中建立了新的开源基准，同时保持了强大的语言能力。值得注意的是，InternVL3-78B在MMMU基准上获得了72.2分，超越了之前的开源多模态大语言模型，并缩小了与领先闭源模型（如Gemini-2.5 Pro）的性能差距。秉承我们促进多模态大语言模型社区驱动创新的承诺，我们将公开发布InternVL3的训练数据和模型权重，从而鼓励这一快速发展领域的进一步研究与发展。
